displayTitle: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith 25: Fortress Vader Part VII
synopsis: In Dark Lord of the Sith 25, Vader uses the Mask of Lord Momin to open a gateway through the Force. In the gateway, Vader confronts his past through a series of visions, meeting important people from his past, including Anakin's mother, Ahsoka, and Padme.
title: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith 25: Fortress Vader Part VII
